summary: Delta re-test after removing TheSplit section and adding real doctor photos with BgStripper on Doctors cards. All acceptance criteria pass at 100%.

verifications.title: Artham — Meaningful Care. Beautifully Delivered.
verifications.section_order_correct: hero -> growth-journey -> philosophy -> doctors -> journey-timeline -> statistics -> patient-journey -> footer (verified by y-positions)
verifications.doctor_names_roles_clinics: All render: 'Dr. Omaima Jawed / Dermatologist / ARTHAM AESTHETIQUE' and 'Dr. Manu Gautam / Orthopedician / ARTHAM ORTHOCARE'

critical_code_review_comments: BgStripper: processes on every mount and stores data URL in state — heavy on canvas; consider useMemo/caching per-src to avoid rework on route re-mount. Acceptable for a 2-image landing page.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 5 delta covered TheSplit removal + doctor photos via BgStripper. All good. Backend not tested (frontend-only request).
